summary: Regression testing for iteration 39 - Backend and Frontend refactoring verification. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend admin tabs and mobile PWA features verified working. No regressions found after extracting models.py, auth.py, database.py from server.py and TeamsTab, EnhancedAcademyTab, RegistrationsTab, ShopTabs from AdminPanel.jsx.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps bottom nav - requires force=True or JS click for reliable navigation. Known issue from previous iteration.
